arabicText: وَالَّذِي نَفْسِي بِيَدِهِ مَا أُنْزِلَتْ فِي التَّوْرَاةِ وَلاَ فِي الإِنْجِيلِ وَلاَ فِي الزَّبُورِ وَلاَ فِي الْفُرْقَانِ مِثْلُهَا، وَإِنَّهَا سَبْعٌ مِنَ الْمَثَانِي وَالْقُرْآنُ الْعَظِيمُ الَّذِي أُعْطِيتُهُ
englishText: By Him in Whose Hand is my soul, Allah has not revealed in the Torah, the Gospel, the Psalms, or the Furqan anything like it. It is the Seven Oft-Repeated Verses and the Great Quran which I have been given.

arabicText: اقْرَءُوا سُورَةَ الْبَقَرَةِ فَإِنَّ أَخْذَهَا بَرَكَةٌ وَتَرْكَهَا حَسْرَةٌ وَلاَ تَسْتَطِيعُهَا الْبَطَلَةُ
englishText: Recite Surat Al-Baqarah, for to take recourse to it is a blessing and to give it up is a cause of grief, and the magicians cannot confront it.

arabicText: اقْرَءُوا الزَّهْرَاوَيْنِ الْبَقَرَةَ وَسُورَةَ آلِ عِمْرَانَ فَإِنَّهُمَا تَأْتِيَانِ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ كَأَنَّهُمَا غَمَامَتَانِ... تُحَاجَّانِ عَنْ أَصْحَابِهِمَا
englishText: Recite the two bright ones, Al-Baqarah and Surah Al Imran, for on the Day of Resurrection they will come as two clouds... pleading for those who recite them.

arabicText: مَنْ عَالَ جَارِيَتَيْنِ حَتَّى تَبْلُغَا جَاءَ يَوْمَ الْقِيَامَةِ أَنَا وَهُوَ هَكَذَا – وَضَمَّ أَصَابِعَهُ
englishText: Whoever supports two girls till they attain maturity, he and I will come on the Day of Resurrection like this — and he joined his fingers.

arabicText: أَيُّهَا النَّاسُ، إِنَّ دِمَاءَكُمْ وَأَمْوَالَكُمْ وَأَعْرَاضَكُمْ عَلَيْكُمْ حَرَامٌ كَحُرْمَةِ يَوْمِكُمْ هَذَا، فِي بَلَدِكُمْ هَذَا، فِي شَهْرِكُمْ هَذَا
englishText: O People, your blood, your property and your honor are sacred to you, as the sacredness of this your day, in this your city, in this your month.

arabicText: عُرِضَتْ عَلَيَّ أَعْمَالُ أُمَّتِي حَسَنُهَا وَسَيِّئُهَا، فَوَجَدْتُ فِي مَحَاسِنِ أَعْمَالِهَا الْأَذَى يُمَاطُ عَنِ الطَّرِيقِ
englishText: The deeds of my Ummah, good and bad, were presented before me, and I found amongst their good deeds the removal of harmful things from the path.

arabicText: أَنْتُمْ عُمَّارُ الْأَرْضِ وَخُلَفَاءُ اللَّهِ فِيهَا، فَانْظُرُوا كَيْفَ تَعْمَلُونَ
englishText: You are the inhabitants of the earth and the trustees of Allah upon it, so see how you act.

arabicText: مَا مِنْ غَازِيَةٍ تَغْزُو فِي سَبِيلِ اللَّهِ فَيُصِيبُونَ الْغَنِيمَةَ، إِلَّا تَعَجَّلُوا ثُلُثَيْ أَجْرِهِمْ مِنَ الْآخِرَةِ
englishText: No military expedition goes out in the way of Allah and acquires spoils of war except that they have been advanced two-thirds of their reward of the Hereafter.
source: Sahih Muslim 1906 (Thematic: The Spoils of War)

arabicText: التَّائِبُ مِنَ الذَّنْبِ كَمَنْ لاَ ذَنْبَ لَهُ
englishText: The one who repents from sin is like one who did not commit sin.
Verily, in the remembrance of Allah do hearts find rest.
source: Quran 13:28 / General Principle (Thematic: Certainty of Yunus)

arabicText: شَيَّبَتْنِي هُودٌ وَالْوَاقِعَةُ وَالْمُرْسَلاتُ وَعَمَّ يَتَسَاءَلُونَ وَإِذَا الشَّمْسُ كُوِّرَتْ
englishText: Surahs Hud, Al-Waqi'ah, Al-Mursalat, 'Amma Yatasa'alun (An-Naba), and Idha Ash-Shamsu Kuwwirat (At-Takwir) have made my hair grey.
Patience is only at the first stroke of a calamity.
source: Sahih al-Bukhari 1302 (Thematic: Patience of Prophet Yusuf)

arabicText: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنْ زَوَالِ نِعْمَتِكَ وَتَحَوُّلِ عَافِيَتِكَ وَفُجَاءَةِ نِقْمَتِكَ وَجَمِيعِ سَخَطِكَ
englishText: O Allah, I seek refuge in You from the withdrawal of Your blessing and the change of Your protection (from me) and from the sudden wrath of You, and from every displeasure of Yours.
source: Sahih Muslim 2739 (Thematic: Awe of The Thunder)

arabicText: مَثَلُ الْمُؤْمِنِ مَثَلُ النَّخْلَةِ، مَا أَخَذْتَ مِنْهَا مِنْ شَيْءٍ نَفَعَكَ
englishText: The parable of a believer is that of a date palm tree; whatever you take from it will benefit you.
source: Al-Mu'jam al-Kabir (Thematic: The Good Tree in Ibrahim)

arabicText: إِنَّا نَحْنُ نَزَّلْنَا الذِّكْرَ وَإِنَّا لَهُ لَحَافِظُونَ
englishText: Indeed, it is We who sent down the Quran and indeed, We will be its guardian. (Quran 15:9)

arabicText: إِنْ قَامَتِ السَّاعَةُ وَفِي يَدِ أَحَدِكُمْ فَسِيلَةٌ، فَإِنِ اسْتَطَاعَ أَنْ لَا تَقُومَ حَتَّى يَغْرِسَهَا فَلْيَغْرِسْهَا
englishText: If the Hour (the day of Resurrection) is about to be established and one of you was holding a palm shoot, let him take advantage of even one second before the Hour is established to plant it.
source: Musnad Ahmad 12902 (Thematic: The Honey Bee & Bounties)

arabicText: لَمَّا أُسْرِيَ بِي مَرَرْتُ بِقَوْمٍ تُقْرَضُ شِفَاهُهُمْ بِمَقَارِيضَ مِنْ نَارٍ
englishText: During my Night Journey (Isra), I passed by people whose lips were being clipped with scissors of fire. I asked: Who are they? Jibril replied: The preachers of your Ummah who say what they do not do.

arabicText: مَنْ حَفِظَ عَشْرَ آيَاتٍ مِنْ أَوَّلِ سُورَةِ الْكَهْفِ عُصِمَ مِنَ الدَّجَّالِ
englishText: Whoever commits to memory the first ten verses of Surat Al-Kahf will be protected from (the trial of) Ad-Dajjal (Antichrist).

arabicText: كُلُّ مَوْلُودٍ يُولَدُ عَلَى الْفِطْرَةِ، فَأَبَوَاهُ يُهَوِّدَانِهِ أَوْ يُنَصِّرَانِهِ أَوْ يُمَجِّسَانِهِ
englishText: Every child is born on the Fitrah (pure human nature), then his parents make him Jewish, Christian or Magian.

arabicText: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَسْأَلُكَ عِلْمًا نَافِعًا، وَرِزْقًا طَيِّبًا، وَعَمَلًا مُتَقَبَّلًا
englishText: O Allah, I ask You for beneficial knowledge, goodly provision and acceptable deeds.
source: Sunan Ibn Majah 925 (Thematic: Taha & Musa's preparation)

arabicText: دَعْوَةُ ذِي النُّونِ إِذْ دَعَا وَهُوَ فِي بَطْنِ الْحُوتِ: لاَ إِلَهَ إِلاَّ أَنْتَ سُبْحَانَكَ إِنِّي كُنْتُ مِنَ الظَّالِمِينَ. فَإِنَّهُ لَمْ يَدْعُ بِهَا رَجُلٌ مُسْلِمٌ فِي شَيْءٍ قَطُّ إِلاَّ اسْتَجَابَ اللَّهُ لَهُ
englishText: The supplication of Dhun-Nun (Prophet Yunus) when he supplicated, while in the belly of the whale was: 'There is none worthy of worship except You, Glory to You, Indeed, I have been of the transgressors.' No Muslim supplicates with it for anything, ever, except Allah responds to him.

arabicText: مَنْ حَجَّ لِلَّهِ فَلَمْ يَرْفُثْ وَلَمْ يَفْسُقْ رَجَعَ كَيَوْمِ وَلَدَتْهُ أُمُّهُ
englishText: Whoever performs Hajj for Allah's pleasure and does not have sexual relations with his wife, and does not do evil or sins then he will return (after Hajj free from all sins) as if he were born anew.

arabicText: أُنْزِلَ عَلَىَّ عَشْرُ آيَاتٍ مَنْ أَقَامَهُنَّ دَخَلَ الْجَنَّةَ، ثُمَّ قَرَأَ: {قَدْ أَفْلَحَ الْمُؤْمِنُونَ} حَتَّى خَتَمَ عَشْرَ آيَاتٍ
englishText: Ten verses were revealed to me, whoever abides by them shall enter Paradise. Then he recited: 'Successful indeed are the believers' (Surah Al-Mu'minun) until he finished ten verses.

arabicText: إِيَّاكُمْ وَالظَّنَّ، فَإِنَّ الظَّنَّ أَكْذَبُ الْحَدِيثِ
englishText: Beware of suspicion, for suspicion is the worst of false tales.
source: Sahih al-Bukhari 6064 (Thematic: The Light & Avoiding Slander)

arabicText: الْمُسْلِمُ مَنْ سَلِمَ الْمُسْلِمُونَ مِنْ لِسَانِهِ وَيَدِهِ، وَالْمُهَاجِرُ مَنْ هَجَرَ مَا نَهَى اللَّهُ عَنْهُ
englishText: A Muslim is the one from whose tongue and hands the Muslims are safe; and a Muhajir (Emigrant) is the one who refrains from what Allah has forbidden.

arabicText: إِنَّ رُوحَ الْقُدُسِ نَفَثَ فِي رَوْعِي أَنَّ نَفْسًا لَنْ تَمُوتَ حَتَّى تَسْتَكْمِلَ أَجَلَهَا وَتَسْتَوْعِبَ رِزْقَهَا
englishText: The Holy Spirit breathed into my heart that no soul will die until it has completed its lifespan and consumed its provision.

arabicText: إِنَّهُ مِنْ سُلَيْمَانَ وَإِنَّهُ بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَنِ الرَّحِيمِ
englishText: Indeed, it is from Sulayman, and indeed, it reads: 'In the name of Allah, the Entirely Merciful, the Especially Merciful.' (Quran 27:30)

arabicText: وَمَنْ يَتَّقِ اللَّهَ يَجْعَلْ لَهُ مَخْرَجًا
englishText: And whoever fears Allah - He will make for him a way out. (Quran 65:2)

arabicText: أَشَدُّ النَّاسِ بَلاَءً الأَنْبِيَاءُ ثُمَّ الأَمْثَلُ فَالأَمْثَلُ
englishText: The people most severely tested are the Prophets, then those most like them, then those most like them.
source: Sunan Ibn Majah 4023 (Thematic: The Spider & Tests of Faith)

arabicText: إِنَّ اللَّهَ يَرْضَى لَكُمْ ثَلاَثًا: أَنْ تَعْبُدُوهُ وَلاَ تُشْرِكُوا بِهِ شَيْئًا، وَأَنْ تَعْتَصِمُوا بِحَبْلِ اللَّهِ جَمِيعًا وَلاَ تَفَرَّقُوا
englishText: Verily, Allah likes three things for you: that you worship Him and associate nothing with Him, and that you hold fast to the rope of Allah, all together, and do not become divided.
source: Sahih Muslim 1715 (Thematic: The Romans & Global Events)

arabicText: رِضَا الرَّبِّ فِي رِضَا الْوَالِدِ، وَسَخَطُ الرَّبِّ فِي سَخَطِ الْوَالِدِ
englishText: The pleasure of the Lord relies on the pleasure of the parents, and the displeasure of the Lord relies on the displeasure of the parents.

arabicText: كَانَ النَّبِيُّ صلى الله عليه وسلم لاَ يَنَامُ حَتَّى يَقْرَأَ الْم تَنْزِيلُ وَتَبَارَكَ الَّذِي بِيَدِهِ الْمُلْكُ
englishText: The Prophet (ﷺ) would not sleep until he had recited Alif Lam Mim Tanzil (Surah As-Sajdah) and Tabarak Alladhi Biyadihil-Mulk (Surah Al-Mulk).

arabicText: مَنْ صَلَّى عَلَيَّ صَلاةً صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ بِهَا عَشْرًا
englishText: Whoever sends blessings upon me once, Allah will send blessings upon him tenfold.
source: Sahih Muslim 384 (Thematic: The Combined Forces & Salawat)

arabicText: عَجَبًا لأَمْرِ الْمُؤْمِنِ إِنَّ أَمْرَهُ كُلَّهُ خَيْرٌ... إِنْ أَصَابَتْهُ سَرَّاءُ شَكَرَ فَكَانَ خَيْرًا لَهُ، وَإِنْ أَصَابَتْهُ ضَرَّاءُ صَبَرَ فَكَانَ خَيْرًا لَهُ
englishText: How wonderful is the case of a believer; there is good for him in everything... If prosperity attends him, he expresses gratitude to Allah and that is good for him; and if adversity befalls him, he endures it patiently and that is better for him.

arabicText: مَا مِنْ أَحَدٍ يَتَوَضَّأُ فَيُحْسِنُ الْوُضُوءَ وَيُصَلِّي رَكْعَتَيْنِ يُقْبِلُ بِقَلْبِهِ وَوَجْهِهِ عَلَيْهِمَا إِلاَّ وَجَبَتْ لَهُ الْجَنَّةُ
englishText: Whoever performs ablution perfectly and offers two rak'at praying them with his heart and face solely directly towards Allah, Paradise becomes obligatory for him.
Recite Ya-Sin over your dying men.

arabicText: مَنْ سَرَّهُ أَنْ يُكْتَالَ بِالْمِكْيَالِ الأَوْفَى فَلْيَقُلْ: سُبْحَانَ رَبِّكَ رَبِّ الْعِزَّةِ عَمَّا يَصِفُونَ * وَسَلَامٌ عَلَى الْمُرْسَلِينَ * وَالْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ
englishText: Whoever wishes that his provisions be given in full measure, let him recite (the ending of As-Saffat): 'Glory be to your Lord, the Lord of Might, above what they describe. And peace be upon the messengers. And praise be to Allah, Lord of the worlds.'
source: Al-Mu'jam al-Awsat (Thematic: Those Arrayed in Ranks)

arabicText: أَلاَ أَدُلُّكَ عَلَى أَبْوَابِ الْخَيْرِ؟ الصَّوْمُ جُنَّةٌ، وَالصَّدَقَةُ تُطْفِئُ الْخَطِيئَةَ كَمَا يُطْفِئُ الْمَاءُ النَّارَ
englishText: Shall I not direct you to the doors of good? Fasting is a shield, and charity extinguishes sin as water extinguishes fire.

arabicText: إِنَّ اللَّهَ يَبْسُطُ يَدَهُ بِاللَّيْلِ لِيَتُوبَ مُسِيءُ النَّهَارِ، وَيَبْسُطُ يَدَهُ بِالنَّهَارِ لِيَتُوبَ مُسِيءُ اللَّيْلِ حَتَّى تَطْلُعَ الشَّمْسُ مِنْ مَغْرِبِهَا
englishText: Allah, the Exalted, continues to stretch out His Hand in the night so that the sinners of the day may repent, and continues to stretch His Hand in the daytime so that the sinners of the night may repent, until the sun rises from the west.
source: Sahih Muslim 2759 (Thematic: The Troops & Boundless Mercy)

arabicText: الدُّعَاءُ هُوَ الْعِبَادَةُ ، ثُمَّ قَرَأَ: {وَقَالَ رَبُّكُمُ ادْعُونِي أَسْتَجِبْ لَكُمْ}
englishText: Supplication is worship itself. Then he recited: 'And your Lord said: Call upon Me, I will respond to you.' (Surah Ghafir 40:60)
The best among you (Muslims) are those who learn the Qur'an and teach it.
The best among you (Muslims) are those who learn the Qur'an and teach it.

The best among you (Muslims) are those who learn the Qur'an and teach it.
The best among you (Muslims) are those who learn the Qur'an and teach it.

arabicText: سُورَةٌ مِنَ الْقُرْآنِ ثَلاَثُونَ آيَةً تَشْفَعُ لِصَاحِبِهَا حَتَّى يُغْفَرَ لَهُ {تَبَارَكَ الَّذِي بِيَدِهِ الْمُلْكُ}
englishText: There is a Surah in the Quran of thirty verses which intercedes for a man until he is forgiven. It is 'Blessed is He in whose hand is the dominion.' (Surah Al-Mulk)
The best among you (Muslims) are those who learn the Qur'an and teach it.
The best among you (Muslims) are those who learn the Qur'an and teach it.

arabicText: أَيَعْجِزُ أَحَدُكُمْ أَنْ يَقْرَأَ ثُلُثَ الْقُرْآنِ فِي لَيْلَةٍ؟ ... {قُلْ هُوَ اللَّهُ أَحَدٌ} تَعْدِلُ ثُلُثَ الْقُرْآنِ
englishText: Is anyone of you incapable of reciting a third of the Quran in a night? ... 'Say: He is Allah, the One' (Surah Al-Ikhlas) is equivalent to a third of the Quran.

arabicText: أَلَمْ تَرَ آيَاتٍ أُنْزِلَتِ اللَّيْلَةَ لَمْ يُرَ مِثْلُهُنَّ قَطُّ {قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ الْفَلَقِ} وَ {قُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ النَّاسِ}
englishText: Have you not seen the verses revealed tonight, the like of which has never been seen? 'Say: I seek refuge with the Lord of the dawn' (Al-Falaq) and 'Say: I seek refuge with the Lord of mankind' (An-Nas).

arabicText: كَانَ إِذَا أَوَى إِلَى فِرَاشِهِ كُلَّ لَيْلَةٍ جَمَعَ كَفَّيْهِ ثُمَّ نَفَثَ فِيهِمَا فَقَرَأَ فِيهِمَا قُلْ هُوَ اللَّهُ أَحَدٌ وَقُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ الْفَلَقِ وَقُلْ أَعُوذُ بِرَبِّ النَّاسِ
englishText: Whenever the Prophet (ﷺ) went to bed every night, he used to cup his hands together and blow over them after reciting Surah Al-Ikhlas, Surah Al-Falaq and Surah An-Nas, and then rub his hands over whatever parts of his body he was able to rub.
